title: 医学进步
subtitle: Medical Progress, Healthcare Innovation, Medical Breakthroughs
assistant_message: Learn to discuss medical progress, healthcare innovations, and the impact of medical breakthroughs.

examples.chinese: 随着医学进步，许多疾病得以治愈。
examples.translation: Along with medical progress, many diseases can be cured.
examples.translation_id: Seiring dengan kemajuan medis, banyak penyakit dapat disembuhkan.

examples.chinese: 疫苗不仅保护个人，而且保护整个群体。
examples.translation: Vaccines not only protect individuals but also protect entire communities.
examples.translation_id: Vaksin tidak hanya melindungi individu tetapi juga melindungi seluruh komunitas.

examples.chinese: 预防疾病的关键在于健康的生活方式。
examples.translation: The key to preventing disease lies in a healthy lifestyle.
examples.translation_id: Kunci mencegah penyakit terletak pada gaya hidup sehat.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Chen Yi
dialogue.chinese: 随着医学进步，许多以前无法治疗的疾病现在可以治愈了。
dialogue.pinyin: Suízhe yīxué jìnbù, xǔduō yǐqián wúfǎ zhìliáo de jíbìng xiànzài kěyǐ zhìyù le.
dialogue.translation: Along with medical progress, many previously incurable diseases can now be cured.
dialogue.translation_id: Seiring dengan kemajuan medis, banyak penyakit yang sebelumnya tidak dapat disembuhkan kini dapat disembuhkan.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Wang Bin
dialogue.chinese: 疫苗不仅保护个人，而且保护整个群体。这就是群体免疫的概念。
dialogue.pinyin: Yìmiáo bùjǐn bǎohù gèrén, érqiě bǎohù zhěnggè qúntǐ. Zhè jiùshì qúntǐ miǎnyì de gàiniàn.
dialogue.translation: Vaccines not only protect individuals but also protect entire communities. This is the concept of herd immunity.
dialogue.translation_id: Vaksin tidak hanya melindungi individu tetapi juga melindungi seluruh komunitas. Inilah konsep kekebalan kelompok.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Wang Bin
dialogue.chinese: 预防疾病的关键在于健康的生活方式。医学创新不断带来新的突破，拯救了无数生命。
dialogue.pinyin: Yùfáng jíbìng de guānjiàn zàiyú jiànkāng de shēnghuó fāngshì. Yīxué chuàngxīn bùduàn dài lái xīn de tūpò, zhěngjiù le wúshù shēngmìng.
dialogue.translation: The key to preventing disease lies in a healthy lifestyle. Medical innovation continues to bring new breakthroughs, saving countless lives.
dialogue.translation_id: Kunci mencegah penyakit terletak pada gaya hidup sehat. Inovasi medis terus membawa terobosan baru, menyelamatkan banyak nyawa.

exercises.question: Complete: 疫苗不仅保护个人，______保护整个群体。
